_comment: Aave V3 real-tx corpus. Source: Etherscan v2 txlist 2026-05-30, free key (only chain 1 + 42161 accessible). chain1 Pool 0x87870bca3f3fd6335c3f4ce8392d69350b4fa4e2 + chain1 WrappedTokenGatewayV3 0xd01607c3c5ecaba394d8be377a08590149325722 + chain42161 Pool 0x794a61358d6845594f94dc1db02a252b5b4814ad. Covered verbose-ABI selectors expect pass/lending. L2Pool packed-args (bytes32 CalldataLogic) selectors expect error/no_declarative_v3_mapper - manifest gap; asset is uint16 reserve-index not address, needs onchain getReserveAddressById + bit-field strategy. Hand fixtures cover Sourcify-verified WrappedTokenGateway withdrawETHWithPermit and official Aave v3-core debt-token credit-delegation signature paths not observed in the sampled txlist.

transactions.intent: stkAAVE stake(to,amount) — deposit AAVE, mint shares
stkAAVE stakeWithPermit(amount,...) — stake w/ permit, shares to submitter
stkGHO stake(to,amount) — deposit GHO, mint shares
GSM USDC buyAsset — buy USDC with GHO (fixed price)
GSM USDC sellAsset — sell USDC for GHO (fixed price)
GSM USDT buyAsset — HAND fixture (GSM_USDT 0 user swaps lifetime; only keeper)
